query.help: Search for items on Opera. Example: opera search query "my search term" --limit 20 --table opera search query "keyword" --filter "price:lt:100" opera search query "keyword" --properties "title,price"
query.usage_instructions: Use `opera search query` to Search for items on Opera. Example: opera search query "my search term" --limit 20 --table opera search query "keyword" --filter "price:lt:100" opera search query "keyword" --properties "title,price". Provide positional arguments: query. Useful options: --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --table/-t, --properties/-p.

item.help: Get details for a specific item. Example: opera search item abc123 --table opera search item "https://example.com/item/abc123" opera search item abc123 --properties "title,price"
item.usage_instructions: Use `opera search item` to Get details for a specific item. Example: opera search item abc123 --table opera search item "https://example.com/item/abc123" opera search item abc123 --properties "title,price". Provide positional arguments: item_id. Useful options: --table/-t, --properties/-p.

list.help: List items from Opera. Example: opera search list --limit 100 --table opera search list --filter "status:active" opera search list --properties "id,name,status"
list.usage_instructions: Use `opera search list` to List items from Opera. Example: opera search list --limit 100 --table opera search list --filter "status:active" opera search list --properties "id,name,status". Useful options: --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --table/-t, --properties/-p.

wildcard.help: Search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. Browser CLIs use client-side search.
wildcard.usage_instructions: Use `opera search wildcard` to Search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. Browser CLIs use client-side search. Provide positional arguments: query. Useful options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --fields, --properties/-p.

search.usage_instructions: Use `opera search` for Search opera commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth login` to Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. Useful options: --profile/-p, --force/-F.

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth logout` to Clear stored credentials and browser sessions. Useful options: --profile/-p.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth status` to Check authentication status across profiles. Useful options: --profile/-p, --table/-t.

refresh.help: Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token.
refresh.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth refresh` to Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token. Useful options: --profile/-p, --table/-t.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth test` to Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. Useful options: --table/-t, --profile/-p.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth profiles list` to List all profiles and show which is the default. Useful options: --table/-t, --limit/-l, --filter/-f, --properties/-p.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth profiles get` to Get details for a specific profile. Provide positional arguments: name. Useful options: --table/-t.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth profiles create` to Create a new profile from .env.example template. Provide positional arguments: name.

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth profiles set-default` to Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1). Provide positional arguments: name.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth profiles delete` to Delete a profile and its data. Provide positional arguments: name. Useful options: --force/-F.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth profiles` for Manage authentication profiles commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `opera auth` for Manage opera authentication commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `opera cache clear` to Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `opera cache` for Manage response cache commands. Check the nested actions in `usage.json` before executing anything.

usage_instructions: Use the `opera` CLI for CLI interface for Opera (browser automation). Commands follow `opera <group> <action>`. Consult `usage.json` before execution instead of guessing flags or argument order.
